arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in Marseille’s Elye Wahi
arts.sum: According to a report by La Provence, Premier League side Arsenal are interested in Olympique de Marseille forward Elye Wahi (22). The Gunners have reportedly added Wahi’s name to a list…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'going all out' to HIJACK new target
arts.sum: Aston Villa are 'going all out' for Levante star Andres Garcia, according to Spanish media. According to various Spanish sources, including MARCA, Cope and Relevo, Aston Villa are pushing for the signing of Levante full-back Andres Garcia.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to seal second January transfer after deal agreed for defender
arts.sum: Garcia, though, has reportedly been identified as a defender with a big future who could be recruited this month. Aston Villa are reportedly set to sign Levante right-back Andres Garcia for a fee of around £6m.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about Donyell Malen, Diego Carlos transfer, injuries and Arsenal
arts.sum: “We are preparing for the match - we are very motivated and we’re going to try to play by improving things we did in Everton and improving things we did away in the last matches against top teams in the Premier League. Villa have won their last three games in all competitions and are targeting successive away league wins against Arsenal after beating the title-chasing Gunners 2-0 in the capital last season.

arts.ttl: Saturday PL Predictions: Arsenal to edge closer to Liverpool?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across Saturday's Premier League action where title-chasing Liverpool and Arsenal are hunting maximum points.

arts.ttl: ‘Internally’: David Ornstein shares how people inside Arsenal feel about Mikel Arteta now
arts.sum: For the first time in a little while, Mikel Arteta is under some pressure at Arsenal. Arsenal are out of the FA Cup, trailing in...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta given Jonathan David transfer approval as Arsenal sent January striker warning
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour admits that he expects the Gunners' bid to sign a new striker during the January transfer window to end in failure.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals why he told Myles Lewis-Skelly to change from being a midfielder to left back after academy graduate's first-team breakthrough
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The 18-year-old's assured midweek performance against Tottenham was widely lauded and his substitution in the second half went viral.
